untranslatable_reason: EEDB (Evening Star/Evening Doji Star) pattern is a multi-bar candlestick pattern recognition rule that cannot be expressed using only the provided single-bar indicators (RSI, MACD, ATR, Bollinger Bands, etc.). Pattern detection requires: (1) identifying three specific candles with particular body/wick relationships, (2) relative sizing comparisons across bars, and (3) gap analysis. The source text references 'volume shapes' (U-shaped, dome-shaped, random) which are qualitative classifications not available as quantitative indicators. The regime labels 'BULL_MARKET' and 'BEAR_MARKET' are also not in the ALLOWED_REGIMES list.
translation_notes: This signal requires candlestick pattern recognition logic beyond the scope of the available indicators. To properly implement, a custom pattern detector for Evening Doji Star would be needed, along with volume shape classification algorithms. The conditional performance metrics (38% in bull, 26% in bear with rising volume) suggest regime-dependent entry filtering rather than mechanical indicator conditions. Recommend implementing as a separate pattern module rather than a rules-based condition set.
